basics.name: Giancarlo Papa
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Engineer – Cloud Platform & AI Engineering
basics.summary: Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 25 years of PHP expertise and deep command of the modern web stack — from Symfony and Laravel to Vue.js, Nuxt, and headless CMS platforms including WordPress, Joomla, Craft CMS, and Shopware. Experienced in Python across data warehouse engineering, FastAPI service development, and automation; grounded in Linux server operations, Docker containerisation, and cloud-native infrastructure on GCP. I design, build, and own business-critical internal platforms — Salesforce DevOps, enterprise integrations, and applied AI systems (Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI, Gemini) — with 13+ years of platform ownership in a demanding Swiss telecommunications environment.

work.name: Sunrise Communications AG
work.position: Senior Full Stack Engineer – Cloud Platform, Salesforce DevOps & AI
work.summary: 13+ years of progressive ownership across full-stack development, Salesforce DevOps, cloud infrastructure, data engineering, and applied AI at one of Switzerland's leading telecommunications companies.
highlights: Salesforce DevOps Engineer: CI/CD pipelines, release management, custom Apex, LWC components, Flows, API integrations, and enterprise data sync.
Drove DevOps transformation: LAMP/LEMP to FrankenPHP on Docker/GCP/RHEL, GitLab CI/Jenkins pipelines, release automation.
Developed AMP (Laravel/Vue.js/Oracle/MySQL/Redis/Elasticsearch): call centre portal — ticket templates (4 langs), distribution, and feedback tools.
Modernised legacy PHP applications to Laravel, Vue.js, and Nuxt — improving maintainability, testability, and delivery speed.
Architected cloud-native services on GCP: compute, networking, IAM, Cloud Run.
Built Jordan AI (Liberty Global): Python/FastAPI + Vue.js — real-time call analysis, conversation pre-summaries, and agent diagnostics across Liberty Global subsidiaries.

work.name: Sicilia On Line Srl
work.position: Full Stack Web Developer / System Engineer
work.summary: Lead developer and system engineer for three regional properties — siciliaonline.it (touristic platform, 10,000+ daily visitors), gds.it, and blogsicilia — with full ownership of PHP application development, CMS architecture, and Linux server operations.
highlights: Built and scaled PHP/MySQL platforms serving 10,000+ daily visitors across siciliaonline.it, gds.it, and blogsicilia.
Developed custom Joomla/Mambo components, plugins, and templates for newsroom and editorial workflows.
Led platform redesigns improving performance, SEO, and reader engagement.
Managed full LAMP stack: Apache, MySQL, server hardening, and high-availability ops.

projects.name: AMP — Application Management Portal
projects.description: Full-stack call centre productivity suite built for Sunrise agents — a multilingual ticket template engine (4 languages), automated ticket distribution system, and agent-to-agent and company-wide feedback tools. Full ownership from architecture to production.
projects.stack: Laravel · Vue.js · Oracle · MySQL · Redis · Elasticsearch · FrankenPHP · Docker · GCP · RHEL

projects.name: Jordan AI (Liberty Global)
projects.description: International AI-powered call assistant deployed across Liberty Global subsidiaries. Developed the Python/FastAPI backend and Vue.js frontend — connecting to live call data to generate real-time conversation pre-summaries and automated diagnostics for call centre agents.
projects.stack: Python · FastAPI · Vue.js · LLM integration · Azure OpenAI · REST APIs
